commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Laden. So Chaldean. (Menochius)
Literally, plenum, "full of. "(Haydock)
Septuagint, "a gomor "which they seem to have read instead of the Hebrew chamor, "an ass of bread "as Sosibius says, "he eats three asses' panniers of loaves. "(Calmet)
Protestants supply, "laden."
